data.title: FINE rose above 0.003USDT. Since its listing on LBank, the highest increase has exceeded 300%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank market data shows that FINE has risen above 0.003 USDT, reaching a high of 0.00305 USDT. The current price is 0.003 USDT. Since its launch on LBank, the current maximum increase has exceeded 300%, and the current market value is approximately 2.8 million US dollars.

data.title: Today's Fear and Greed Index dropped to 28, and the level is still panic
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Alternative.me data, today's cryptocurrency panic and greed index dropped to 28 (yesterday's was 34), and the level is still panic.
Note: The panic index threshold is 0-100, including indicators: volatility (25%) + market trading volume (25%) + social media heat (15%) + market research (15%) + Bitcoin's proportion in the entire market (10%) + Google hot word analysis (10%).

data.title: Robinhood fined $26 million by U.S. regulator for multiple violations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) issued a press release stating that it has ordered Robinhood Financial to pay $3.75 million to customers and fined Robinhood Financial and Robinhood Securities $26 million for violating multiple FINRA rules, including failing to respond to red flags of potential misconduct. In the settlement agreement, the two companies accepted the results of the FINRA investigation but neither admitted nor denied the allegations, and agreed to promise to rectify the relevant issues. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Fear And Greed Index Drops To 28
data.description: According to PANews, the cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has decreased to 28, indicating a state of fear. This is a drop from the previous day's index of 34. The index, which ranges from 0 to 100, is calculated based on several factors: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media sentiment (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's market dominance (10%), and Google search trends (10%).

data.title: Manus: Official X account unfrozen, and reiterated that it did not participate in token issuance
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AI Agent product Manus official X account has been unfrozen. ManusAI (ManusAI_HQ) official account posted, "We are back, remind you, this is our only official account, we will continue to share cool use cases, stay tuned."
Manus chief scientist and co-founder Ji Yichao also announced the news as soon as possible, and reiterated: "Manus has never participated in any cryptocurrency projects, token issuance, blockchain initial launch, etc. Any virtual currency with a similar name, which claims to be related to us is false." (Jinshi)

data.title: Retail Pharmacy Giant Handing $6,800,000 To Customers After Hackers Trigger Massive Data Breach
data.description:
Millions of customers at a retail pharmacy giant are set to receive their share of multi-million dollar settlement following a major hack and data breach. A total of 2.2 million Rite Aid customers will share a $6.8 million settlement after hackers from the RansomHub group stole a trove of personal information over the summer. The […]
The post Retail Pharmacy Giant Handing $6,800,000 To...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/08/retail-pharmacy-giant-handing-6800000-to-customers-after-hackers-trigger-massive-data-breach/

data.title: South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol Released From Detention
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 8, television footage showed South Korean President Yoon Suk-yeol walking out of a detention center in Seoul. President Yoon's lawyer stated that there were procedural and substantive issues with his detention. His release marks the beginning of restoring the rule of law.

data.title: South Korean President Yoon Seok-yeol has left Seoul detention center on foot
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News TV footage shows South Korean President Yoon Seok-yeol walking out of the Seoul Detention Center. Yoon Seok-yeol's lawyer said there were procedural and substantive problems with Yoon Seok-yeol's detention. His release is the beginning of restoring the rule of law. (Jin Shi)

data.title: LBank has launched This Is Fine (FINE)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched This Is Fine (FINE) at 16:30 (SGT) on March 8, and opened the FINE/USDT trading pair. At present, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 16:00 on March 9.

data.title: Data: Bitcoin miners haven’t sold since February 28
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data disclosed by crypto analyst Ali Martinez on the X platform, Bitcoin miners have not sold since February 28.
